description: Square graphic built around a color photograph of an adult man photographed outdoors in front of a brown brick wall and a beige metal door. He has short dark hair, wears a white tank top, and has star tattoos on both shoulders. Across the lower third a red banner with large white text reads 'WORST OF THE WORST'. Below the banner is the U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark. A dark SUV and orange traffic cone are partly visible at left.
notable_text: WORST OF THE WORST; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
